entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Students continue lessons in Algebra 2/Trig and begin Precalculus if ready.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Mathematics: Grade 11

Mathematics: Grade 11
Students should look ahead to college math requirements at schools they may want to attend or majors they may plan to pursue and plan accordingly. It is important to work at a student's pace. Alveary pacing has students study geometry and algebra concurrently in 9th and 10th grade and then finish Algebra II/Trig during 11th grade. Students can then start precalculus in 11th grade and finish 12th grade with precalculus or calculus.
